creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
Added WAIS support to gopher. I also tried FreeWAIS-sf, but it has
changed so much that it doesn't build easily, it also seems 
unreasonable to link PERL into gopher.

How-To-Repeat: Gopher is probably obsolete now, but when I used it I found the WAIS
access very useful. I don't know if there is interest for this, or 
even if it works (I can't test the WAIS part anymore), but this patches
won't affect have any negative effect.
